title: Wiki configuration
description: Per-wiki branding and behavior. Edit directly or run `npm run init`.

noindex.description: If true, robots noindex meta + disable sitemap

description.description: Site description used in llms.txt header

brand_os_url.description: Base URL of the brand OS (e.g. https://my-brand-os.vercel.app). Used by render-graphic.sh to fetch brand.txt and GABRs. Leave empty if no brand OS.

intake_mode.description: How this wiki grows. source-grounded: fold in external sources faithfully with citation. authored-canon: author net-new original philosophy that coheres with the canon. Drives which intake skill scripts/init-intake-skill.sh scaffolds into static/skills/.

skill_prefix.description: Namespace for this wiki's skills when registered into the global registry (e.g. 'humanperformance' -> humanperformance-intake). Defaults to projectName minus a trailing -wiki. Used by scripts/register-skills.sh.
